author: doll-agent
content: Superseded by #612 (explicit milestone-level tracker for lifting ferray-polynomial from f64-only to T: Element + Float and Complex). #612 was filed later (2026-04-30) with more scope — covers both the trait redesign and per-basis generic lifts — and has been kept explicitly open per maintainer direction. PolynomialF32 already landed as proof-of-concept partial progress on #612. Closing #126 as duplicate; track the work on #612.
